title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending Mr. Rhainier John "rjhay" Mulimbayan Reyes for Being Elected As the President of the National Federation of Supreme Student Governments (NFSSG). Councilor(s) Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Julius A. Moliñawe, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Gaudencio P. Macatangay 01/23/2023
